case_title: IRMA SANCHEZ VS. MANUEL MUNOZ et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: O'BRIEN, PHILIP SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MUNOZ, MAIRA
LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, ADVANCED FROM APR-30-2007 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-11-2007 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER EX PARTE ORDER OF APR-06-2007.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: O'BRIEN, PHILIP SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR MUNOZ, MANUEL

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS MANUEL MUNOZ, MAIRA MUNOZ, AND LETICIA LANDAVERDE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CCP SECTION 827 NOTICE DID NOT BECOME EFFECTIVE UNTIL MARCH 15, 2007. AS A CONSEQUENCE, ALL THREE DEFENDANTS HAD THE RIGHT TO TENDER RENT IN JANUARY, FEBRUARY AND MARCH AND AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE NOTICE TO QUIT IS DEFECTIVE AND CANNOT BE CURED BY AMENDMENT TO THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MUNOZ, MANUEL MUNOZ, MAIRA LANDAVERDE, LETICIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Advanced From Apr-30-07 To Apr-11-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Philip O'Brien,, Esq., 415-970-9512 for defendants and moving parties Manuel Munoz, Maira Munoz & Leticia Landaverde
Karen Uchiyama, Esq, 415-271-3364 for plaintiff and opposing party Irma Sanchez

RULING:
ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
DEFENDANTS MANUEL MUNOZ, MAIRA MUNOZ, AND LETICIA LANDAVERDE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CCP SECTION 827 NOTICE DID NOT BECOME EFFECTIVE UNTIL MARCH 15, 2007. AS A CONSEQUENCE, ALL THREE DEFENDANTS HAD THE RIGHT TO TENDER RENT IN JANUARY, FEBRUARY AND MARCH AND AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE NOTICE TO QUIT IS DEFECTIVE AND CANNOT BE CURED BY AMENDMENT TO THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600
